mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.title, a.description, a.course_id AS courseId, a.deadline, a.total_score AS totalScore, a.create_time AS createTime FROM assignments a WHERE a.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO assignments ( title, description, course_id, deadline, total_score, content, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{description}, #{courseId}, #{deadline}, #{totalScore}, #{content}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE assignments
title = #{title},
description = #{description},
deadline = #{deadline},
total_score = #{totalScore},
content = #{content},
update_time = #{updateTime}
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT s.id, s.assignment_id AS assignmentId, s.user_id AS userId, s.content, s.score, s.feedback, s.submit_time AS submitTime, s.graded_time AS gradedTime FROM assignment_submissions s
s.assignment_id = #{assignmentId}
AND s.graded_time IS NULL
AND s.graded_time IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY s.submit_time DESC
SELECT id, file_url AS fileUrl, file_name AS fileName, file_size AS fileSize FROM submission_attachments WHERE submission_id = #{submissionId}
